title: rubus scitus
intro: Rubus scitus, also known as the New Caledonian raspberry or raspberry rose, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The medicinal properties of Rubus scitus include its high levels of antioxidants, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, and its health benefits are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Rubus scitus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
